raw.title: Masonry ASD Design Calculator
raw.body_text: Project 💾 Save📂 Load 🖨 Summary📄 Full Calc⊞ Expand All⊝ Collapse Masonry ASD Design Calculator Masonry ASD Design Calculator Allowable Stress Design for Masonry Structures Material Properties Masonry Compressive Strength (f'm) [psi] Steel Yield Strength (fy) [psi] Steel Modulus (Es) [psi] Allowable Steel Stress (Fs) [psi] Section Geometry OPEN CELL GROUTED CELL As = 0.40 in² d = 3.813" Comp. face b = 32" l = 7.625" M = 45,685 lb·in V = 964 lb Masonry Cross Section Width (b) [in] Length/Thickness (l) [in] Steel Area (As) [in²] Stirrup Area (Av) [in²] Stirrup Spacing (s) [in] Grouting Type Partially Grouted (γg = 0.75) Fully Grouted (γg = 1.0) Design Loads Moment (M) [lb·in] Shear (V) [lb] Axial Load (P) [lb] (+ = compression; 0 = flexure only) CALCULATE CLEAR Design Results Shear Stress Check Check Reference Demand Capacity D/C Status Detail Masonry Shear TMS 402 §8.3 fv = 7.90 psi Fv = 47.06 psi 0.17 PASS ▸ Calc Anv = 122.00 in² | fv = V/Anv = 7.902 psi M/(V·d) = 1.000 | Fvm = 47.062 psi | Fvs = 0.000 psi Fvm,max = 83.666 psi | Fv = Fvm+Fvs ≤ Fvm,max = 47.062 psi Flexural Stress Check Check Reference Demand Capacity D/C Status Detail Flexural Stress TMS 402 §8.2 fb = 744.6 psi Fb = 787.5 psi 1.04 FAIL ▸ Calc ρ = 3.279 ×10⁻³ | n = 18.4 | k = 0.292 | j = 0.903 As,req = M/(Fs·j·d) = 0.415 in² | As,prov = 0.400 in² Masonry: fb = 744.6 psi ≤ Fb = 0.45f′m = 787.5 psi (D/C = 0.95) Steel: fs = 33191 psi ≤ Fs (D/C = 1.04) Combined Axial + Flexure (P–M) Check Check Reference Demand Capacity D/C Status Detail Combined P+M (Cracked Section) TMS 402-22 §8.3.4.2.2 P = 4,639 lb M = 45,685 lb-in fb ≤ 787.5 psi fs ≤ 32000 psi 0.81 PASS ▸ Calc Simultaneous P–M equilibrium; no fa/Fa + fb/Fb unity equation. Inputs: P = 4,639 lb; M = 45,685 lb-in; b = 32.00 in; t = 7.625 in; d = 3.813 in; As = 0.40 in²; n = 18.41 Moment about steel: Ms = M + P(d − t/2) = 45,685 + 4,639×(3.813 − 3.813) = 45,685 lb-in Solve ΣF and ΣM with masonry tension neglected: c = kd = 1.321 in; Cm = 13547.3 lb; Ts = 8908.3 lb; Cm − Ts = 4639.0 lb = P fb = 641.1 psi ≤ 0.45f′m = 787.5 psi (D/C 0.814); fs = 22270.8 psi ≤ Fs = 32000 psi (D/C 0.696) Slenderness scope: this is a cross-section interaction check. Entered P and M must already include the governing member analysis; second-order/slenderness effects are not generated here and require a separate TMS §8.3.4 member-stability check. ⇄ ResultsDesign moment: 3.81 kip-ft→Design shear: 0.96 kips→Allowable shear stress: 47.06 psiRequired steel area: 0.42 in^2Max D/C ratio: 1.04 Save & Load Designs SAVE CURRENT DESIGN EXPORT RESULTS No saved designs ⇄ Results Hub ⇄ Results Hub× Max D/C ratio1.037 Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Required steel area0.415 in^2 Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Allowable shear stress47.06 psi Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Design shear0.964 kips Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Design moment3.807 kip-ft Masonry ASD Design Calculator · 7/11/2026 Copy Anchor T+V Interaction0 Masonry Top-of-Wall Anchor — ASD | TMS 402-22 §8.1.4.3 · 7/11/2026 Copy Anchor Allow. Shear Bv2.853 kips Masonry Top-of-Wall Anchor — ASD | TMS 402-22 §8.1.4.3 · 7/11/2026 Copy Anchor Allow. Tension Ba4.969 kips Masonry Top-of-Wall Anchor — ASD | TMS 402-22 §8.1.4.3 · 7/11/2026 Copy
